mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USER_ROLE ( MEMBER_ID , ROLE_ID , REG_DT ) VALUES ( #{memberId} , #{roleId} , GETDATE() )
mapper.select:
SELECT UR.MEMBER_ID, M.MEMBER_NM, UR.ROLE_ID, R.ROLE_NM, UR.REG_DT FROM USER_ROLE UR INNER JOIN MEMBER M ON UR.MEMBER_ID = M.MEMBER_ID INNER JOIN ROLE R ON UR.ROLE_ID = R.ROLE_ID WHERE 1=1
AND UR.MEMBER_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND M.MEMBER_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
ORDER BY UR.MEMBER_ID ASC, UR.ROLE_ID ASC OFFSET #{firstIndex} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{recordCountPerPage} ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(*) totcnt FROM USER_ROLE UR INNER JOIN MEMBER M ON UR.MEMBER_ID = M.MEMBER_ID INNER JOIN ROLE R ON UR.ROLE_ID = R.ROLE_ID WHERE 1=1
AND UR.MEMBER_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND M.MEMBER_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
SELECT UR.MEMBER_ID, UR.ROLE_ID, R.ROLE_NM, UR.REG_DT FROM USER_ROLE UR INNER JOIN ROLE R ON UR.ROLE_ID = R.ROLE_ID WHERE UR.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} ORDER BY UR.ROLE_ID ASC
SELECT MEMBER_ID, MEMBER_NM FROM MEMBER WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY MEMBER_ID ASC
SELECT ROLE_ID, ROLE_NM FROM ROLE WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY ROLE_ID ASC
